data.name: Register_Success
data.value: Account created successfully. You can now log in.

data.name: Join_Description
data.value: Enter the game master's username and the session technical name.

data.name: Join_GameMasterRequired
data.value: The game master username is required.

data.name: Join_SessionSlugRequired
data.value: The session technical name is required.

data.name: JoinSession_MustBeLoggedIn
data.value: You must be logged in to join a session.

data.name: JoinSession_NoPasswordRequired
data.value: This session does not require a password.

data.name: SessionPage_NoGameSystems
data.value: You have not created any game systems yet.

data.name: SessionPage_AssignGameSystem
data.value: Assign this system to the session

data.name: SessionPage_CloneAndEditForSession
data.value: Duplicate and edit for this session

data.name: SessionPage_GameSystemAssigned
data.value: Game system assigned to the session.

data.name: SessionPage_NoAssignedGameSystem
data.value: No game system is linked to this session.

data.name: ResumeSession_None
data.value: You have not created any sessions yet.

data.name: GameSystems_None
data.value: You have not created any systems yet.

data.name: EditGameSystem_NoOptionsForTrait
data.value: No options for this trait type.

data.name: EditGameSystem_TraitTypeNameRequired
data.value: The trait type name is required.

data.name: Backend_OnlyGameMastersCanCreateSession
data.value: Only game master accounts can create a session.

data.name: Backend_SessionNameAlreadyExists
data.value: You already have a session with this name.

data.name: Backend_GameSystemAccessDenied
data.value: Access denied for this game system.

data.name: Backend_SessionHasNoGameSystem
data.value: This session does not have a game system assigned yet.

data.name: Backend_PlayerAlreadyHasAliveCharacter
data.value: You already have a living character in this session.

data.name: PlayerRoom_NoGameSystem
data.value: The game master has not selected a game system for this session yet.

data.name: PlayerRoom_NoCharacterYet
data.value: You do not have a character in this session yet.

data.name: PlayerRoom_OnlyDeadCharacters
data.value: You no longer have a living character in this session.

data.name: PlayerRoom_ReadOnlyDeadCharacter
data.value: This character is dead: read-only view for now.

data.name: Backend_TestAlreadyActive
data.value: A test is already active in this session.

data.name: Backend_SuccessThresholdRequired
data.value: A success threshold is required for this system.

data.name: Backend_NoEligibleCharactersForTest
data.value: No living and connected character can participate in this test.

data.name: Backend_InvalidDiceCount
data.value: The number of dice must be between 1 and 5.

data.name: Backend_InvalidDiceSides
data.value: The number of sides must be between 2 and 100.

data.name: GameTest_PlayerSectionTitle
data.value: Test requested by the game master

data.name: GameTest_NoGameSystemForSession
data.value: This session does not have a game system yet.

data.name: GameTest_NoAttributeAvailable
data.value: No attribute is available for a test.

data.name: Backend_InvalidDifficultyValue
data.value: Difficulty must be a positive or zero integer.

data.name: GameTest_RollbackSuccess
data.value: The last test has been rolled back and its effects have been restored.

data.name: PlayerRoom_CreateCharacterAvailableLater
data.value: You will be able to create a new character from {0}.

data.name: PlayerRoom_CreateCharacterCountdown
data.value: You will be able to create a new character in {0} second(s).

data.name: PlayerRoom_OldCharacterRestored
data.value: Your new character creation was cancelled because your previous character was brought back to life.

data.name: GameTest_RollbackConfirmQuestion
data.value: Are you sure you want to rollback the last test?

data.name: Backend_PollAlreadyActive
data.value: A poll is already active in this session.

data.name: Backend_PollNeedsTwoOptions
data.value: The poll must contain at least two options.

data.name: Backend_NoAliveCharacterForVote
data.value: You must have a living character to vote.

data.name: Backend_PlayerAlreadyVoted
data.value: You have already voted in this poll.

data.name: Poll_DisappearsIn
data.value: This poll will disappear in {0} second(s).

data.name: Backend_InvalidPollWeightBonus
data.value: Weight bonus must be positive or zero.

data.name: Poll_UndoConsequences
data.value: Undo the consequences of the latest poll

data.name: Poll_UndoConsequencesConfirmQuestion
data.value: Do you really want to undo only the consequences of the latest poll? The poll and its votes will be kept.

data.name: Poll_UndoConsequencesSuccess
data.value: The consequences of the latest poll have been undone.

data.name: Backend_LastPollIsNotClosed
data.value: The latest poll is not closed yet.

data.name: Backend_LastPollHasNoAppliedConsequences
data.value: The latest poll has no applied consequences to undo.

data.name: Backend_OnlyUsersWithPositiveJmsCanCreateSession
data.value: This account cannot create a session while its JMS limit is set to 0.

data.name: Backend_OnlyUsersWithPositiveJmsCanManageGameSystems
data.value: This account cannot manage game systems while its JMS limit is set to 0.

data.name: EditGameSystem_ApplyOnlyWhenConfirmed
data.value: Local changes are not saved until you click “Apply changes”.

data.name: EditGameSystem_DeletionResponsibilityWarning
data.value: Deletions and their consequences are the GM's responsibility. However, the latest system change can still be undone, up to the last 5 backups.

data.name: EditGameSystem_SharedWarningText
data.value: Editing this system will also affect the following sessions currently using it. If you do not want to affect them, duplicate the system inside those sessions before editing it.

data.name: EditGameSystem_SharedWarningContinueQuestion
data.value: Do you really want to apply changes to this shared system?

data.name: EditGameSystem_ChangesApplied
data.value: The system changes have been applied.

data.name: EditGameSystem_LastChangeUndone
data.value: The latest system change has been undone.

data.name: Backend_GameSystemSharedEditConfirmationRequired
data.value: This system is shared with existing sessions. Confirmation is required before applying changes.

data.name: Backend_GameSystemMustKeepAtLeastOneHealthGauge
data.value: The last health gauge cannot be deleted: a character must always have at least one IsHealthGauge.

data.name: Backend_GameSystemNoSnapshotToUndo
data.value: No system backup is available to undo.

data.name: SessionSettings_Saved
data.value: The session settings have been saved.

data.name: SessionSettings_SavedWithUrlChange
data.value: The session settings have been saved and the join URL has been updated.

data.name: EditCharacter_Saved
data.value: The character sheet has been saved.

data.name: EditCharacter_ResurrectionBlocked
data.value: This player already has another living active character, so this character cannot be brought back to life.

data.name: Backend_CharacterNotFoundForSession
data.value: The requested character does not exist in this session.

data.name: EditGameSystem_DiceDefaultHelp
data.value: In V1, you can define a fixed or random default value for base stats. Computed skills and metrics are prepared in the database but are not yet enabled in the UI.

data.name: EditGameSystem_FoundationDeliveryNotice
data.value: This first delivery enables random default values for base stats and prepares the computed skills and metrics tables for the next steps.

data.name: Backend_GameSystemBaseStatNameRequired
data.value: Each base stat must have a name.

data.name: Backend_InvalidBaseStatRange
data.value: A base stat minimum value cannot be greater than its maximum value.

data.name: Backend_InvalidFixedBaseStatDefaultValue
data.value: A fixed base stat default value must stay within its min/max range.

data.name: Backend_InvalidAttributeDefaultDiceExpression
data.value: The default dice formula is invalid. Use at most 5 dice, between 2 and 100 sides, and a total compatible with the min/max range.

data.name: EditGameSystem_DerivedStatsHelp
data.value: A computed skill is the sum of weighted base stats using percentage coefficients, then rounded with the selected mode. Examples: 50 = 0.5; 100 = 1; 150 = 1.5.

data.name: EditGameSystem_ComponentWeightHelp
data.value: The formula is: ceiling of the sum of each base stat multiplied by its coefficient / 100.

data.name: EditCharacter_DerivedStatsReadonly
data.value: Computed skills are read-only here: they are automatically recalculated from the base stats.

data.name: Backend_DerivedStatNameRequired
data.value: Each computed skill must have a name.

data.name: Backend_InvalidDerivedStatRange
data.value: A computed skill minimum value cannot be greater than its maximum value.

data.name: Backend_DerivedStatMustHaveAtLeastOneComponent
data.value: A computed skill must depend on at least one base stat.

data.name: Backend_InvalidDerivedStatComponentWeight
data.value: A component coefficient must be between 1 and 500.

data.name: Backend_InvalidDerivedStatComponentAttribute
data.value: A computed skill component must reference a valid base stat.

data.name: EditGameSystem_MetricsHelp
data.value: Metrics are computed values used by system mechanics, for example poll vote weight.

data.name: Poll_VoteWeightMetricHelp
data.value: If a metric is selected, the vote weight is computed automatically from the character.

data.name: Backend_MetricNameRequired
data.value: Each metric must have a name.

data.name: Backend_InvalidMetricRange
data.value: A metric minimum value cannot be greater than its maximum value.

data.name: Backend_InvalidMetricBaseValue
data.value: A metric base value must stay within its min/max range.

data.name: Backend_MetricMustHaveAtLeastOneComponent
data.value: A metric must contain at least one component.

data.name: Backend_InvalidMetricComponentWeight
data.value: A metric component weight must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.name: Backend_PollMetricRequired
data.value: A metric must be selected for this vote weight mode.

data.name: Backend_PollMetricNotFound
data.value: The selected metric for this poll could not be found.

data.name: EditCharacter_NoTalentsDefined
data.value: No talent is defined in this system.

data.name: EditCharacter_NoItemsDefined
data.value: No item is defined in this system.

data.name: Backend_TalentNameRequired
data.value: Each talent must have a name.

data.name: Backend_ItemNameRequired
data.value: Each item must have a name.

data.name: Backend_InvalidCharacterSelectionForSession
data.value: At least one selected character does not belong to this session.

data.name: Backend_InvalidCharacterEffectOperation
data.value: The requested effect operation is invalid.

data.name: Backend_InvalidCharacterEffectTarget
data.value: The requested effect target is invalid.

data.name: Backend_InvalidCharacterEffectTalentTarget
data.value: The talent targeted by this effect is invalid.

data.name: Backend_InvalidCharacterEffectItemTarget
data.value: The item targeted by this effect is invalid.

data.name: Backend_CharacterEffectBatchNameRequired
data.value: The effect batch name is required.

data.name: MassDistribution_NotFound
data.value: Session not found or access denied.

data.name: Backend_MassDistributionNoBatchToUndo
data.value: No mass distribution batch can be undone.

data.name: Backend_MassDistributionUndoSnapshotInvalid
data.value: The undo snapshot for the last batch is invalid.

data.name: Backend_InvalidTestConsequenceApplyOn
data.value: The test consequence apply condition is invalid.

data.name: Backend_InvalidTestConsequenceTarget
data.value: The test consequence target is invalid.

data.name: Backend_InvalidTestConsequenceOperation
data.value: The test consequence operation type is invalid.

data.name: Backend_InvalidPollConsequenceTarget
data.value: The poll consequence target is invalid.

data.name: Backend_InvalidPollConsequenceOperation
data.value: The poll consequence operation type is invalid.
